selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: a. 很少的, 微小的
n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职
words.definition: n. a seat for one person, with a support for the back

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 声音, 嗓音, 嗓子, 愿望, 发言权, 表达, 喉舌, 语态；vt. 表达, 吐露, 调音
words.definition: n. the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 碗, 木球, 大酒杯；v. 滚木球, 快而稳地行驶
words.definition: n. a round vessel that is open at the top; used chiefly for holding food or liquids;

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 妻子, 太太, 夫人
words.definition: n. a married woman; a man's partner in marriage

words.translation: n. 怀疑, 疑惑；v. 怀疑, 不信
words.definition: n. the state of being unsure of something

words.translation: a. 热的, 热心的, 辣的, 热情的, 激动的, 猛烈的, 紧迫的；adv. 热, 紧迫地
words.definition: a. used of physical heat; having a high or higher than desirable temperature or giving off heat or feeling or causing a sensation of heat or burning

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狭长港湾, 武器；vt. 武装, 装备
words.definition: n. a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 页, 记录, 事件, 专栏, 男侍；vt. 标明...的页数, 翻...的书页, 分页排版, 呼叫, 侍候
words.definition: n. one side of one leaf (of a book or magazine or newspaper or letter etc.) or the written or pictorial matter it contains

words.translation: n. 价格, 代价, 价值；vt. 定...的价格
words.definition: n. the amount of money needed to purchase something

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: num. 十, 十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system

words.translation: n. 底部；a. 底部的
words.definition: n. the lower side of anything

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 味道, 品味, 味觉, 感受, 体验, 爱好, 审美, 少量；vt. 尝, 察觉...的味道, 体会
words.definition: n. the sensation that results when taste buds in the tongue and throat convey information about the chemical composition of a soluble stimulus

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 风, 气息, 气味, 呼吸, 风声, 趋势, 空谈, 卷绕, 弯曲；vt. 使通风, 嗅出, 使喘气, 吹号角, 上发条, 缠绕, 包, 绞起, 吊起, 使弯曲, 使迂回
words.definition: n. air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure

words.translation: vi. 同意, 赞成, 应允, 适合；vt. 承认, 认定, 同意
words.definition: v. be in accord; be in agreement

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: prep. 包围, 在...周围, 四处；adv. 兜着圈子, 在附近, 到处
words.definition: r. by a circular or circuitous route

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏
words.definition: a. having undesirable or negative qualities

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of least lightness (bearing the least resemblance to white)

words.translation: n. 休息, 中断, 破裂处, 绝交, 破晓, 突变；vt. 打破, 弄破, 弄坏, 破坏, 违反, 打断, 削弱, 放弃
words.definition: n. an unexpected piece of good luck

words.translation: a. 完全的, 十足的, 完成的；vt. 完成, 完工, 使圆满
n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养
words.definition: n. a male parent (also used as a term of address to your father)

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 食物, 养料
words.definition: n. any substance that can be metabolized by an animal to give energy and build tissue

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: n. 市场, 交易, 集市, 推销地区, 行情, 市面, 销路；vt. 在市场上交易, 使上市, 销售
words.definition: n. the world of commercial activity where goods and services are bought and sold

words.translation: n. 音乐, 乐曲
words.definition: n. an artistic form of auditory communication incorporating instrumental or vocal tones in a structured and continuous manner

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 薪资, 付款, 补偿；vt. 支付, 付清, 补偿, 偿还, 对...有利, 为...涂防水物
adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: n. 停留, 逗留, 制止, 延缓, 停止, 支柱, 支撑物, 支索；vt. 制止, 延缓, 坚持, 支持, 支撑, 用支索固定
words.definition: n. continuing or remaining in a place or state

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 走, 散步, 步行, 行走的路程, 竞走, 散步场所；vi. 走路, 步行, 处世
words.definition: n. the act of traveling by foot

words.translation: n. 呼吸, 气息, 瞬间
words.definition: n. the process of taking in and expelling air during breathing

words.translation: a. 厚的, 粗壮的, 浓的, 迟钝的, 浑浊的, 多雾的, 过分的, 口齿不清的；adv. 厚地, 密地, 浓浓地
words.definition: a. not thin; of a specific thickness or of relatively great extent from one surface to the opposite usually in the smallest of the three solid dimensions

words.translation: num. 六, 六个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of five and one

words.translation: n. 风格, 时尚, 文体, 风度, 字体, 类型；vt. 称呼, (根据新款式)设计, 使合潮流
words.definition: n. a particular kind (as to appearance)

words.translation: n. 册, 卷, 体积, 容量, 大量, 许多, 份量, 音量；vi. 成团卷起
words.definition: n. the amount of 3-dimensional space occupied by an object

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: a. 明亮的, 聪明的, 鲜明的, 欢快的；adv. 明亮地, 欢快地
words.definition: a. emitting or reflecting light readily or in large amounts

words.translation: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚
words.definition: n. a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

words.translation: n. 叫声, 哭声, 大叫；vi. 哭, 叫, 喊
words.definition: n. a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: n. 梦, 空想, 愿望；v. 做梦, 想象, 梦想
words.definition: n. a series of mental images and emotions occurring during sleep

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: a. acting or moving or capable of acting or moving quickly

words.translation: n. 地板, 楼层, 底部, 底价；vt. 铺地板, 打倒
words.definition: n. the inside lower horizontal surface (as of a room, hallway, tent, or other structure)

words.translation: a. 新鲜的, 新奇的, 另外的, 淡的, 精神饱满的, 冒失的；adv. 最新地, 刚刚
words.definition: a. recently made, produced, or harvested

words.translation: n. 黄金, 钱财, 金块, 金色, 宝贵；a. 金的, 似金的, 金色的, 金制的
words.definition: n. coins made of gold

words.translation: n. 枪
words.definition: n. a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: a. 简单的, 普通的, 朴素的, 单纯的, 绝对的, 初级的, 原始的, 迟钝的；n. 出身低微者, 傻子
words.definition: a. having few parts; not complex or complicated or involved

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: a. 真实的, 正确的, 忠诚的, 可靠的, 纯粹的, 正式的；n. 真实, 准确
words.definition: a. consistent with fact or reality; not false

words.translation: n. 重, 重量, 体重, 砝码, 重大, 影响, 力量；vt. 加重量于, 压迫, 使加权, 称重量
words.definition: n. the vertical force exerted by a mass as a result of gravity

words.translation: a. 较好的；adv. 比较好
n. 视野, 风景, 见解, 视力, 观看, 视图, 指望, 意图, 印象；vt. 看, 考虑, 视察, 查看, 估量
words.definition: n. the visual percept of a region

words.translation: a. 睡着的, 长眠的, 麻木的；adv. 熟睡地
words.definition: a. in a state of sleep

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 跃, 回跳, 范围, 边界；a. 受约束的, 装有封面的, 有义务的, 关联的, 被束缚的, 准备去...的, 便秘的
n. 粗糙的东西, 毛坯, 未加工品, 梗概, 草图, 暴徒, 艰难；a. 粗糙的, 粗暴的, 蓬乱的, 草率的, 大致的, 简陋的, 暴风雨的, 艰难的
words.definition: n. the part of a golf course bordering the fairway where the grass is not cut short

words.translation: a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: s. belonging to times long past especially of the historical period before the fall of the Western Roman Empire

words.translation: a. 生气的, 愤怒的
words.definition: a. feeling or showing anger

words.translation: n. 面包, 生计, 食物；vt. 裹以面包屑
words.definition: n. food made from dough of flour or meal and usually raised with yeast or baking powder and then baked

words.translation: interj. 再会, 回头见
words.definition: n. you advance to the next round in a tournament without playing an opponent

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: a. 好笑的, 有趣的, 滑稽的；n. 滑稽人物
words.definition: s. experiencing odd bodily sensations

words.translation: n. 铁, 熨斗, 铁器, 坚强, 烙铁, 镣铐；vt. 烫平, 熨, 用铁包
words.definition: n. a heavy ductile magnetic metallic element; is silver-white in pure form but readily rusts; used in construction and tools and armament; plays a role in the t

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
n. 谎言, 假象, 位置；vi. 躺着, 说谎, 位于, 展现, 存在, 停泊
words.definition: n. a statement that deviates from or perverts the truth

words.translation: n. 思想, 愿望, 智力, 记忆, 心理, 情绪, 理智, 主意, 心意；vi. 介意, 注意, 留心
words.definition: n. that which is responsible for one's thoughts and feelings; the seat of the faculty of reason

words.translation: n. 宠物, 受宠爱的人, 宠坏的孩子, 不悦, 生气；a. 宠爱的, 表示亲昵的, 养着观赏的, 特别珍爱的, 格外的
words.definition: n. a domesticated animal kept for companionship or amusement

words.translation: n. 骄傲, 自尊心, 自豪, 精华, 勇气；vt. 以...自豪
words.definition: n. a feeling of self-respect and personal worth

words.translation: n. 盐, 风趣, 刺激；a. 含盐的, 咸的, 风趣的, 辛辣的
words.definition: n. a compound formed by replacing hydrogen in an acid by a metal (or a radical that acts like a metal)

words.translation: n. 鞋, 靴, 外胎；vt. 给...穿鞋, 为马钉蹄铁
words.definition: n. footwear shaped to fit the foot (below the ankle) with a flexible upper of leather or plastic and a sole and heel of heavier material

words.translation: n. 暴风雨, 骚动, 风波, 风暴, 猛攻；vi. 起风, 猛冲, 怒吼
words.definition: n. a violent weather condition with winds 64-72 knots (11 on the Beaufort scale) and precipitation and thunder and lightning

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 街区, 木块, 石块, 块；vt. 阻塞, 封锁, 使成块状
words.definition: n. a solid piece of something (usually having flat rectangular sides)

words.translation: n. 演员阵容, 投掷, 铸件, 预测, 特性；vt. 投, 掷, 抛, 脱落, 铸, 使弯曲, 计算
words.definition: n. the actors in a play

words.translation: adv. 确定地
n. 逃亡, 避难设备, 逃跑；vi. 逃脱, 避开, 溜走
words.definition: n. the act of escaping physically

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
words.definition: r. in truth (often tends to intensify)

words.translation: vt. 宁可, 较喜欢, 提出
words.definition: v. like better; value more highly

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 赛跑, 流出, 运转；a. 流动的, 跑着的, 连续的
words.definition: n. the state of being in operation

words.translation: n. 串联, 序列, 连续, 系列, 丛书, 套, 级数, 组
words.definition: n. similar things placed in order or happening one after another

words.translation: n. 布料, 织品, 布；[建] 布
a. 离去的, 死去的, 用完的；go的过去分词
words.definition: s. no longer retained

words.translation: a. 饥饿的, 荒年的, 渴望的, 不毛的
words.definition: a. feeling hunger; feeling a need or desire to eat food
